tests: 10 tests in test_analysis_endpoint.py: happy path (returns results, records marked analysed, result persisted in DB, record_ids in result), idempotency (second POST returns empty), no-unanalysed-records (all analysed returns empty, empty DB returns empty), 413 (data exceeds MAX_UPLOAD_BYTES with monkeypatched threshold, data exceeds 1 KB threshold with large fields)
